penalties.description: Video appears to be educational content rather than a complete FLS Task 2 performance, preventing verification of task completion.

reasoning: Major disagreement between models on video content interpretation. Claude identified this as educational content without complete task performance, while GPT-4o scored it as a completed task. Given the fundamental disagreement about whether a scorable task performance occurred, the conservative approach is to treat this as incomplete educational content that cannot be scored according to FLS rubric requirements.
